children.name:
AssertionError: re-granting must not duplicate: expected 1 'sales_certified' cert, got 2 — BE creates a second cert on re-grant; confirm with BE (renew vs reject)
assert 2 == 1
 +  where 2 = len([{'__v': 0, '_id': '6a5dc8d13d53d0f1e0e48491', 'certificationType': 'sales_certified', 'createdAt': '2026-07-20T07:05:...id': '6a5dc8d13d53d0f1e0e4849e', 'certificationType': 'sales_certified', 'createdAt': '2026-07-20T07:05:53.979Z', ...}])

AssertionError: approved deal must stamp rate + rateTableVersion, got rate=None rateTableVersion=None — not present in the deal API response; confirm with BE (stamped internally / different stage / unimplemented)
assert (None is not None)

AssertionError: deal-register negative gaps:
    - ghost planId (verified absent above): status=201, msg='Deal registered successfully'
assert not ["ghost planId (verified absent above): status=201, msg='Deal registered successfully'"]

AssertionError: re-inviting must not duplicate: expected 1 user for qa.auto+jamessmith@mailinator.com, got 2 — BE creates a second user on re-invite; confirm with BE (reject or idempotent)
assert 2 == 1
 +  where 2 = len([{'email': 'qa.auto+jamessmith@mailinator.com', 'firstName': 'Johnny', 'lastName': 'Gray', 'partnerId': '6a5dc8fd34113...o+jamessmith@mailinator.com', 'firstName': 'Johnny', 'lastName': 'Gray', 'partnerId': '6a5dc8fd3411347af9ad02e2', ...}])
